records.ety: [LL. disculpatus, p. p. of disculpare to disculpate; dis- + L. culpare to blame, culpa fault.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Disculpated; p. pr. & vb. n. Disculpating.]

defs: To free from blame or the imputation of a fault; to exculpate.
quotes: I almost fear you think I begged it, but I can disculpate myself.
